Eduardo Peralta

Software Engineer

Mérida, Yucatán

About Me

Software developer with 9 years of experience, collaborating with engineering teams both as an individual contributor and as a technology lead.

My main strength is bringing structure and clarity to projects — organizing tasks according to business priorities so teams can move fast without losing sight of what matters.

Strong expertise in backend development, API integrations, databases, and automation. Currently incorporating AI and code agents to build higher-quality software even faster.

Experience

Early Stage Mexico January 2026 – Present

Fullstack Engineer · Contractor

Responsible for the design, development, and implementation of software solutions using TypeScript, React, Next.js, Drizzle ORM, and Mastra. Working across both frontend and backend following engineering best practices.

  • › Developed end-to-end features across frontend and backend layers.
  • › Designed and maintained APIs and business logic using TypeScript.
  • › Built modern, responsive user interfaces with React and Next.js.
  • › Modeled and managed database schemas using Drizzle ORM.
  • › Delivered software, technical documentation, and related artifacts for each release.
  • › Applied best practices: modular architecture, strict typing, clean code, and scalable design principles.
Polisofwares Mexico January 2025 – January 2026

Head of Technology

Led and built a solid RESTful API for Mexico's General Hospital project alongside a team of developers, implementing healthcare data standards and robust security protocols.

  • › Implemented HL7 FHIR protocol for healthcare data interoperability.
  • › Applied security measures: JWT auth, token-based communication, data encryption.
  • › Enforced SOLID principles and design patterns (Singleton, Controller–Service–Repository).
  • › Provided technical guidance; defined technologies, architecture, and dev roadmap.
  • › Reviewed requirements, defined tasks, dependencies, estimates, and planning.
  • › Implemented integration and unit tests to catch bugs before production.
YAVE Mexico December 2023 – January 2025

Software Engineer

Backend engineer focused on enhancing the codebase following best practices, ensuring APIs are secure, scalable, and well-documented.

  • › Integrated Stripe for Payment Flow, enabling scalable high-volume transaction handling.
  • › Built a modular setup to manage multiple Stripe API versions cleanly.
  • › Developed an application to manage and validate fiscal/tax information, designed for future scalability.
Mi Salud USA December 2021 – November 2023

Software Engineer

Full-stack engineer on a telehealth platform connecting clinicians and patients. Early hire on a team that scaled to 12 engineers. Stack: Go (Clean Architecture), Node.js, Express, React.

  • › Improved socket communication security with token-based authentication.
  • › Refactored scheduled queries to optimize concurrency and accommodate more simultaneous users.
  • › Internationalized the application to support multiple languages with a scalable i18n architecture.
  • › Developed API services for dynamic dashboard configuration across user groups.
  • › Dev-owned QA: code reviews and end-to-end testing across devices and browsers.
  • › Created user-friendly custom React components in close collaboration with the design team.
Listo Servicios Digitales Mexico June 2019 – 2021

Project Manager

Responsible for project planning and client communication. Conducted thorough internal testing to guarantee quality before delivery.

  • › Created scheduling model separating support from dev tasks, improving deadline accuracy.
  • › Automated the invoice issuance process for a well-known Japanese automotive brand.
  • › Analyzed business requirements to determine platform compatibility or custom dev needs.
  • › Applied Scrum methodology for sprint planning and hour allocation.
  • › Oversaw integrations with accounting systems (Contpaq, Intelisis, SAP).
  • › Provided expert guidance and support to clients consuming our APIs.
Jaguar Innovación Tecnológica Mexico Earlier experience

Software Engineer — R&D

Software developer in the Research & Development team, innovating and creating devices for the IoT industry.

  • › Developed a people-recognition system with AI for movie theaters.
  • › Retrained a Convolutional Neural Network to classify available vs. occupied seats.
  • › Used TensorFlow (Python) to train convolutional neural networks.
  • › Implemented Movidius NCS (VPU) to enhance neural network inference performance.
  • › Coordinated between electronics, mechatronics, and software teams to integrate a prototype.
